PostToolUse.name: php-syntax-check
PostToolUse.description: Run php -l on edited PHP files (no-op if php is not on PATH)

hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$file_path" ] && exit 0; case "$file_path" in *.php|*.phtml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1 && php -l "$file_path" 2>&1 || true

PostToolUse.name: php-cs-fixer
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format with php-cs-fixer if present in the project (no-op otherwise)

hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$file_path" ] && exit 0; case "$file_path" in *.php|*.phtml) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; fixer="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer"; [ -x "$fixer" ] && "$fixer" fix "$file_path" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

PreToolUse.name: php-pre-commit-gate
PreToolUse.description: Run phpstan + phpunit before git commits if they are installed in the project

hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit' || exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; ok=1; [ -x vendor/bin/phpstan ] && vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress 2>&1 || ok=0; [ -x vendor/bin/phpunit ] && vendor/bin/phpunit --no-coverage 2>&1 || ok=0; exit $ok
